pi_items.source: Task description explicitly states the repository must be named 'maven-explorer'.
Task description specifies proxying 'https://repo1.maven.org/maven2'. Checked via cURL that this is the active Maven Central repository.
Task description specifies adding the public description 'Proxy for browsing Maven Central'.
Task description has a CRITICAL instruction to enable the 'List Remote Folder Items' setting.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires configuring a JFrog Artifactory Remote Maven Repository named 'maven-explorer'. It must proxy the real Maven Central repository at 'https://repo1.maven.org/maven2'. The public description must be set to 'Proxy for browsing Maven Central', and the 'List Remote Folder Items' setting must be enabled.
